title: Introduction to AI Agents
summary: Understand what AI agents are, how they differ from chatbots and pipelines, and why the shift to agentic AI is the most important architecture change in modern software development.

title: The Claude Agent SDK
summary: Get hands-on with Anthropic's Agent SDK. Learn how to install it, define tools with automatic schema generation, wire up memory, and run your first working agent in under 30 lines of code.

title: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
summary: Master MCP — the open standard that lets any agent connect to any tool without custom glue code. Learn the host/server/transport architecture and build a fully functional MCP server from scratch.

title: Agent Skills
summary: Go beyond individual tools. Learn how to package capabilities into reusable Skill modules with their own instructions, compose multiple skills on a single agent, and design skill libraries your whole team can share.

title: Building & Deploying Agents
summary: Ship production-ready agents. Covers trajectory testing, eval harnesses, Docker packaging, cloud deployment, structured observability, and battle-tested guardrails that keep agents safe at scale.

title: Multi-Agent Systems & Orchestration
summary: Scale beyond a single agent. Learn the orchestrator-worker pattern, build an orchestrator that delegates tasks to specialist subagents, and master fan-out/fan-in execution for parallel workloads.

title: Memory & State Management
summary: Give your agents genuine long-term memory. Understand the four types of agent memory, implement semantic search with vector databases, and design state machines for agents that run across multiple sessions.

title: Agent Security & Safety
summary: Understand and defend against the unique threats that AI agents face. Covers prompt injection, tool privilege abuse, data exfiltration, input/output validation, and responsible deployment practices.

title: Advanced Prompt Engineering for Agents
summary: Go beyond basic system prompts. Learn the five-component architecture of production prompts, manage context windows as a scarce resource, and use few-shot examples and chain-of-thought to dramatically improve reasoning quality.

title: Production Case Studies
summary: Learn from real production agents. Two detailed case studies — a code review agent and a data analysis agent — show how every concept in this course comes together in systems that serve real users at scale.

title: Agentic RAG & Knowledge Systems
summary: Go beyond basic vector search. Learn hybrid retrieval, cross-encoder re-ranking, structured document processing, and how to build a production knowledge pipeline that stays fresh and auditable.

title: Agent Evaluation & Benchmarking
summary: Measure what matters. Design robust eval frameworks, write calibrated LLM-as-judge rubrics, and build continuous evaluation pipelines that catch regressions before they reach users.

title: Streaming & Real-Time Agents
summary: Build agents that feel instant. Implement response streaming, profile and eliminate latency bottlenecks, and design event-driven agents that react to webhooks and real-time data sources.

title: Fine-Tuning & Model Specialization
summary: Know when and how to go beyond prompting. Learn the fine-tuning decision framework, collect high-quality trajectory data, train with DPO, and evaluate specialised models rigorously before deployment.

title: Capstone: Shipping Your Agent
summary: Bring everything together. Design a multi-tenant agent SaaS, understand the emerging agent developer career and toolchain, and apply the course framework to your own capstone project.
